query:
SELECT id, first_name, last_name, email, pipeline_stage, application_submitted_at, created_at, admin_notes
FROM recruitment_prospects
WHERE email = 'maxillingworth@icloud.com'
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 5;

SELECT id, first_name, last_name, email, stage, created_at
FROM prospects
WHERE email = 'maxillingworth@icloud.com'
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 5;
